name: Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
description: A scalable e-commerce solution built with Next.js, NestJS, and Prisma. Features secure authentication, real-time inventory management, and a seamless checkout experience.

name: Social Media Dashboard
description: A comprehensive dashboard for managing social media metrics, built using the MERN stack. Includes real-time data visualization and user management.

name: Project Management Tool
description: A collaborative tool for managing team projects with real-time updates using Supabase and Next.js. Focuses on clean architecture and efficient state management.

name: Competitive Programming Solutions
description: A collection of 350+ LeetCode problems and other algorithmic solutions focusing on optimized data structures and algorithms in C++.
